title: 彩虹樂章
lyrics_text:
[verse]
雨後的彩虹，童年的夢想

我們在草地邊，放開雙手

讓五彩的光芒，照亮心房
[chorus]
音樂在空中飛舞，童年的回憶

每一抹色彩，都是愛情的詩篇
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Line 3 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Line 5 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Line 9 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 7.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 11.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "詞彙：增加用詞多樣性，減少同一詞語的頻繁重複。", "連貫性：加入重複副歌段落以強化整體結構感。"]
